abilities.name: Hydro Barrier
abilities.text: As long as Rayquaza has any Holon Energy cards attached to it, each of your Water Pokémon has no Weakness.

attacks.name: Delta Search
attacks.text: Search your deck for a Holon Energy card and attach it to Rayquaza. Shuffle your deck afterward.

tests.name: hydro_barrier_removes_water_weakness
tests.description: Test that Hydro Barrier removes Weakness from Water Pokemon

tests.name: hydro_barrier_requires_holon_energy
tests.description: Test that Hydro Barrier requires Holon Energy attached

tests.name: delta_search_finds_holon_energy
tests.description: Test that Delta Search can find and attach Holon Energy
